title: Parks and other recreation facilities
doc_html:
§2333.  Parks and other recreation facilities

The Authority is authorized to establish or otherwise provide for public parks and other recreation facilities and to acquire land for such purposes.  

Added by Acts 1950, No. 261, §13.
